answer: The June 12, 2026 retail margin anomaly was a net margin drop caused by the pricing shadow ledger duplicating promotional adjustments after joining on non-unique `sku` instead of `order_line_id`. The bad rollout was `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger`, and the fix was to roll it back and rebuild `margin_daily` from `order_line_id`-deduplicated ledger rows.

facts.remediation: Roll back `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger` and rebuild `margin_daily` from `order_line_id`-deduplicated order line ledger rows.
facts.root_cause: Pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments because a transform joined adjustment rows by `sku` instead of `order_line_id`, multiplying adjustments before they reached `margin_daily`.
